meta.title: A2UI form-family catalog rows + Generative Form + Patterns pages
meta.author: planner (design seat)

nodes.label: ADR-0053 (form-family rows + naming law) + ADR-0054 (submit-gated action seam), both PROPOSED
nodes.accept: adr_check.py exits 0 on both; Status stays `proposed` until Kim rules the forks (F1/F2 in the companion .md); no build slice dispatches before ratification

nodes.label: catalog.json form-family rows: Field · FormProvider · Checkbox · Switch · Select · Option + TextField reach (type/currency/unit/step/min/max)
nodes.accept: loadCatalog accepts the document; new jsdom probes: a payload using EACH new row validates with 0 CATALOG failures via validateA2ui, and a negative control (unknown prop on Field) still fails CATALOG; TextField payload carrying type='currency', currency, step, min, max validates clean

nodes.label: default factories for the six rows (catalog/default/factories.ts + index)
nodes.accept: factories.test.ts: each new type create()s its ui-* control (Option → the [role=option] primitive div); Checkbox/Switch label→textContent (bespoke, the buttonFactory precedent); Field/FormProvider/Select via accessorFactory; value marks: Checkbox/Switch {prop:'checked',event:'change'}, Select {prop:'value',event:'select'}; registry.register(defaultCatalog) passes (no CATALOG_FACTORY_MISSING)

nodes.label: WidgetFactory.submitGate mark + registry gate-selector derivation (catalog/types.ts + registry.ts)
nodes.accept: tsc green; registry exposes the gate tag set derived from registered factories; negative control: a catalog with no submitGate factory yields an empty selector and the renderer's gate lookup is a no-op

nodes.label: renderer submit-gated action (renderer.ts #wireAction)
nodes.accept: jsdom: click on a submit:true Button inside an INVALID FormProvider emits NO action and calls reportValidity on the first invalid member (registration order); valid → exactly ONE action emitted (dataModel present when sendDataModel); submit:true with NO gate ancestor emits normally; an un-flagged action's behavior is byte-identical (zero-drift: existing action.test/renderer.test stay green untouched)

nodes.label: a2ui-catalog SPEC repair (§5.1 WidgetFactory + §5.2 normative rows)
nodes.accept: §5.2 rows equal catalog.json types exactly (SPEC-N2, no silent dead types); ChoicePicker row superseded with the ADR-0053 link; §5.1 WidgetFactory shows submitGate; action-shape note references the ADR-0054 `submit` flag; all cross-references resolve

nodes.label: Generative Form page (site/a2ui-form.html + site/pages/a2ui-form.ts/.css)
nodes.accept: npm run check (incl. check:site) green; ONE payload renders the whole form (ui-field-wrapped TextField ×2 incl. one numeric/typed + Checkbox + Switch + Select under FormProvider) through the public createRenderer; displayed JSON derived from the SAME fed objects; page load finalizes with 0 errors in the message log; browser-verified by hand per the component-reviewer discipline before commit

nodes.label: Patterns page (site/a2ui-patterns.html + site/pages/a2ui-patterns.ts/.css)
nodes.accept: npm run check green; 5 demoSections each a [payload | live surface] pair; every payload finalizes with 0 errors; each blurb names what the pattern PROVES about the protocol; payloads shown≡fed

nodes.label: site TOC entries (pages/_page.ts NAV + main.ts CARD_GROUPS)
nodes.accept: site-toc gate green; both renderings list a2ui-form + a2ui-patterns in the A2UI group; no dead hrefs (pages exist first)

nodes.label: wave integration gate
nodes.accept: npm run check && npm test exit 0 at the integration commit; the a2ui jsdom suite (incl. the new catalog/renderer probes) green; no components-package source touched (size gate unaffected — assert via git diff scope)

actions.label: pin the submit-gate mechanism + the bindable-naming law as ratifiable decisions
declare Field/FormProvider/Checkbox/Switch/Select/Option rows an agent payload can emit
widen the TextField row to the shipped 12-type + numeric attribute reach
bind each new catalog type to its live ui-* control (or sanctioned primitive)
mark the provider factory as the submit gate and derive the gate selector generically
gate a submit-flagged action on provider validity with first-invalid reportValidity
keep the catalog SPEC truthful to the shipped rows and seams
render ONE payload as a complete, coordinated, accessibly-labelled form
surface inline validation (checks → setCustomValidity → ui-field error) live
round-trip the typed aggregate to the agent on a valid submit
render the five pattern demos as [payload | surface] pairs
teach the per-pattern protocol lesson (what it proves, what an agent author learns)
navigate to the new pages from both TOC renderings
hold the wave green across the type + behavior gates

edges.why: the rows realize the ADR-0053 naming law (Checkbox `checked`, Select rename) — catalog.json must encode the ratified names
submitGate is ADR-0054's factory-mark contract; the type widening encodes the ratified seam
#wireAction's submit branch implements ADR-0054's gate semantics (order of gate → emit, no-gate fallthrough)
the SPEC repair is the ADRs' Repairs field — it records the ratified facts, so it cannot precede ratification
factories are keyed by the declared type names and must cover them exactly (CATALOG_FACTORY_MISSING at register)
the renderer resolves the gate ancestor via the registry's factory-derived selector — the mark must exist to be read
the form page's live surface needs the registered factories to render the new types
the page's submit flow (invalid → reportValidity, valid → action) rides the renderer seam
three of the five patterns use the new form rows; the page cannot render before they register
TOC links must point at existing pages (dead-href guard)
TOC links must point at existing pages (dead-href guard)
the integration gate verifies SPEC↔catalog.json parity landed in the same wave
check:site covers the new page modules at the integration commit
check:site covers the new page modules at the integration commit
the site-toc gate runs green only after both renderings are edited
